goal: Imagen de fondo full-bleed para la sección CTA de rentatelo.com — Overseas Highway en dusk/blue hour, la carretera sobre el océano que solo es posible experimentar con un carro propio, vendiendo el road trip como necesidad emocional.

creative_direction.core_idea: La Overseas Highway al dusk — el road trip más icónico de USA, solo posible con un carro
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Este CTA no vende un carro — vende el hecho de que SIN el carro, nunca llegas aquí

composition.layout: highway road as central leading lines vanishing to horizon center, turquoise water both sides, sky dominant upper half, left third open sky and water for CTA text overlay

camera.framing: left third reserved — open sky and water, no road surface in that zone — clear for white headline and CTA button overlay
camera.angle: low road-level or slight car-interior POV — pavement visible in foreground, horizon at upper center
camera.lens_style: 24–28mm wide — maximizes leading lines and horizon drama
camera.depth_of_field: deep focus — road sharp from foreground through vanishing point, water and sky sharp throughout

overlay_compatibility.zone_content: open dusk sky transitioning to dark water surface
overlay_compatibility.brightness_target: left zone luminance 20–40% — sky darkening toward indigo ensures legibility

subject.type: road and landscape scene — no people
subject.primary_feature: Overseas Highway asphalt road as strong perspective leading lines disappearing to ocean horizon vanishing point
subject.water: turquoise Atlantic and Gulf water visible both sides of highway — water stretching to horizon
subject.sky: dusk gradient — amber-orange at horizon transitioning through rose to deep indigo above
subject.traffic: 1 to 2 oncoming car headlight streaks as long exposure effect — subtle, not dominant
subject.guardrails: low concrete or metal highway guardrails both sides — low profile, not blocking water view

scene.location: Overseas Highway, US-1, Florida Keys — between Islamorada and Marathon, Monroe County, Florida
scene.time_of_day: dusk / blue hour — 10 to 25 minutes after sunset, amber horizon, indigo sky above
environment: two-lane Overseas Highway with double yellow center line as leading perspective guide
turquoise Atlantic Ocean on left side of highway
Gulf of Mexico on right side of highway
low concrete or metal highway guardrails both sides
amber-to-indigo dusk sky with soft cloud layers at horizon
1–2 oncoming car headlight streaks — long exposure suggestion, subtle
scene.background_view: highway vanishing to ocean horizon at center — ocean and sky merge at horizon line, no land visible at vanishing point — infinite open water ahead
critical_scene_rules: no people visible anywhere in scene
no rental car logos or commercial signage on road or vehicles
left third must be open sky and water — road not present in that zone
sky must clearly be dusk blue hour — amber at horizon, indigo above — not black night
turquoise water must be visible both sides of highway simultaneously
highway must read as Overseas Highway US-1 Florida Keys — not a generic causeway
headlight streaks optional but preferred — long exposure feel adds motion energy
no palm trees, no urban structures — pure highway over water landscape

lighting.primary: natural dusk — last amber light at ocean horizon, indigo sky taking over above
lighting.quality: dramatic and cinematic — the tension between warm horizon and cool indigo sky
lighting.water_lighting: turquoise water catching last amber horizon light on surface, deeper shadows toward edges
lighting.road_lighting: dark asphalt with faint amber reflection from horizon, white road markings as leading lines
lighting.headlight_treatment: 1–2 oncoming headlight streaks as warm white-amber light trails — long exposure effect
lighting.horizon_treatment: thin amber-rose line where water meets sky — maximum dramatic contrast with indigo above

dominant: deep indigo sky above transitioning to amber at horizon
turquoise-teal water both sides in 168F8A range
dark asphalt road as neutral path
accent: amber F0B576 at dusk horizon line
soft rose-pink in cloud layers above horizon
rules: sky must have strong amber-to-indigo gradient — this is the visual engine of the image
water must be turquoise-teal 168F8A — not grey or dark blue
road must be dark and receding — leading lines not competing with sky drama
left zone trends to medium-dark indigo sky — essential for white CTA overlay legibility
no warm orange dominant over full image — warmth confined to horizon band

negative_prompt: rental car logos or commercial signage
black night sky without blue hour gradient
grey or dark water — must be turquoise
road absent or not prominent as leading lines
aerial or drone perspective from high altitude
heavy traffic — maximum 2 subtle headlight streaks
generic causeway not identifiable as Florida Keys
master_prompt: Full-bleed CTA background image for rentatelo.com — the emotional argument for renting a car: without it, you never reach this place. Show the Overseas Highway, US-1, in the Florida Keys between Islamorada and Marathon, Monroe County, Florida at dusk and blue hour — 10 to 25 minutes after sunset. The two-lane asphalt highway stretches from foreground directly to the ocean horizon at center frame, double yellow center line and white edge lines acting as strong perspective leading lines vanishing to a point where ocean and sky meet. Turquoise water from both the Atlantic and the Gulf of Mexico is visible on either side of the highway simultaneously, low guardrails keeping the water view unobstructed. The sky above is a dramatic dusk gradient: thin amber-orange at the horizon line, transitioning through rose-pink cloud layers to deep indigo above. One or two oncoming car headlights appear as subtle warm white streaks in the distance — long exposure feel, not dominant. No people visible anywhere. Low road-level angle or slight car-interior POV, 24–28mm wide lens, deep focus throughout. The left third of the frame contains only open dusk sky and water — reserved for white headline and CTA button overlay, luminance 20–40%. Color: deep indigo sky, amber F0B576 at horizon band, turquoise-teal 168F8A water, dark asphalt road. Avoid: people, rental logos, palm trees, urban structures, daytime light, black sky, grey water, heavy traffic, aerial perspective, text, watermarks.
